title: TooManyHerobrines
description: TooManyHerobrine adds a variety of Herobrine-themed mobs, including regular Minecraft mobs with Herobrine skins that are hostile. It also spawns different "Herobrine" player-like entities with varying colors and costumes.
body:
# TooManyHerobrine

**TooManyHerobrine** is a parody mod that spawns multiple Herobrine-themed mobs throughout your Minecraft world. Regular Minecraft mobs like Creepers and Zombies are re-skinned with Herobrine's appearance and are hostile, adding a twist to the game.

In addition to these reskinned mobs, the mod introduces different "Herobrine" player-like entities, each with varying colors and costumes. The result is an abundance of Herobrine-inspired creatures, adding a humorous and eerie touch to your world.

This mod is perfect for those looking to have fun with the Herobrine myth while being overwhelmed by a variety of Herobrine-lookalikes!
